label: Status / Native Bridge Check
notes: Safe diagnostic action only; confirmed stable path because it performs no actor creation

label: MP Probe / Script Availability
notes: Logs NET multiplayer state and checks common freemode/deathmatch/ctf script paths without launching them

label: MP Enable Multiplayer Native
notes: Calls NET_ENABLE_MULTIPLAYER(true) and logs session/host state; use before launch attempts

label: MP Open Networking UI Probe
notes: Attempts known UI_ENTER networking layer names; this avoids replacing the crashing networking.sc.xml in content.rpf

label: MP Start Core Threads
notes: Attempts multiplayer_system_thread and multiplayer_update_thread only if DOES_SCRIPT_EXIST reports a matching path

label: MP Launch Freemode
notes: Attempts freemode script path variants only if DOES_SCRIPT_EXIST reports a matching path

label: MP Launch Deathmatch
notes: Attempts deathmatch script path variants only if DOES_SCRIPT_EXIST reports a matching path

label: MP Launch CTF
notes: Attempts ctf_base_game script path variants only if DOES_SCRIPT_EXIST reports a matching path

label: Dismiss Tracked Actors
notes: Safe cleanup action for any previously tracked CodeRED actors

label: Spawn Disabled - Raw Native Crashes
notes: CONFIRMED CRASH TRIGGER; do not call raw CREATE_ACTOR_IN_LAYOUT from the menu until ASI source has hard guards and a safer vehicle/gringo lane

notes: Disabled because it depends on spawned actor handles after the spawn crash trigger
